---
title: "June 2026 — Trip Calendar"
subtitle: "Florence · Naples · Puglia"
categories: [planning, overview]
toc: false
---

```{=html}
<style>
/* ── Screen styles ── */
.cal-wrap { overflow-x: auto; margin: 1.5rem 0; }

table.june-cal {
  width: 100%;
  border-collapse: collapse;
  font-family: inherit;
  table-layout: fixed;
}

table.june-cal th {
  background: #2c3e50;
  color: #fff;
  text-align: center;
  padding: 0.5rem 0.25rem;
  font-size: 0.85rem;
  letter-spacing: 0.05em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

table.june-cal td {
  border: 1px solid #ccc;
  vertical-align: top;
  padding: 0.4rem 0.5rem;
  height: 90px;
  width: 14.28%;
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  line-height: 1.35;
}

.day-num {
  font-size: 1rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  display: block;
  margin-bottom: 0.2rem;
}

.day-label {
  font-size: 0.72rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  display: block;
  margin-bottom: 0.15rem;
}

.day-detail {
  font-size: 0.68rem;
  color: #444;
  display: block;
  line-height: 1.3;
}

/* Cell color classes */
td.home      { background: #f5f5f5; color: #888; }
td.depart    { background: #dbeafe; border: 2px solid #2563eb; }
td.arrive    { background: #dbeafe; border: 2px solid #2563eb; }
td.travel    { background: #bfdbfe; border: 2px solid #1d4ed8; }
td.florence  { background: #dcfce7; border: 1px solid #16a34a; }
td.naples    { background: #ffedd5; border: 1px solid #ea580c; }
td.naples-depart { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #ffedd5 50%, #bfdbfe 50%); border: 2px solid #9333ea; }
td.puglia    { background: #fef9c3; border: 1px solid #ca8a04; }
td.home-return { background: #f0fdf4; border: 2px solid #16a34a; }
td.empty     { background: #fafafa; }

/* ── Print styles ── */
@media print {
  .quarto-sidebar, .quarto-navbar, .page-navigation,
  #quarto-sidebar, #quarto-header, footer,
  nav.quarto-secondary-nav, .quarto-title-meta,
  .quarto-title-banner, .callout { display: none !important; }

  body, .content, .page-columns { margin: 0 !important; padding: 0 !important; }
  .column-page, .column-body, #quarto-content { max-width: 100% !important; }

  h1.title  { font-size: 18pt; margin-bottom: 2pt; }
  p.subtitle { font-size: 11pt; margin-bottom: 6pt; }

  table.june-cal { width: 100%; font-size: 7.5pt; }
  table.june-cal td { height: 68pt; padding: 3pt 4pt; }
  .day-num    { font-size: 10pt; }
  .day-label  { font-size: 6.5pt; }
  .day-detail { font-size: 6pt; }
  .legend-wrap { font-size: 7.5pt; margin-top: 6pt; }
}
</style>

<div class="cal-wrap">
<table class="june-cal">
<thead>
<tr>
  <th>Sunday</th>
  <th>Monday</th>
  <th>Tuesday</th>
  <th>Wednesday</th>
  <th>Thursday</th>
  <th>Friday</th>
  <th>Saturday</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>

<!-- Week 1: Jun 1–6 -->
<tr>
  <td class="empty"></td>
  <td class="home"><span class="day-num">1</span></td>
  <td class="home"><span class="day-num">2</span></td>
  <td class="home"><span class="day-num">3</span></td>
  <td class="home"><span class="day-num">4</span></td>
  <td class="depart">
    <span class="day-num">5</span>
    <span class="day-label">✈️ Day 1 — Depart</span>
    <span class="day-detail">MSN→ORD→Frankfurt<br>LH 8835 + LH 0433<br>Departs ORD 10:30pm</span>
  </td>
  <td class="arrive">
    <span class="day-num">6</span>
    <span class="day-label">✈️ Day 2 — Arrive Florence</span>
    <span class="day-detail">FRA→FLR (LH 9498)<br>Land Florence 6:30pm<br>First night in Italy</span>
  </td>
</tr>

<!-- Week 2: Jun 7–13 -->
<tr>
  <td class="florence">
    <span class="day-num">7</span>
    <span class="day-label">🏛 Day 3 — Florence</span>
    <span class="day-detail">Duomo dome climb<br>Uffizi Gallery<br>Ponte Vecchio</span>
  </td>
  <td class="florence">
    <span class="day-num">8</span>
    <span class="day-label">🏛 Day 4 — Florence</span>
    <span class="day-detail">Accademia — David<br>Medici Chapels<br>Mercato Centrale</span>
  </td>
  <td class="florence">
    <span class="day-num">9</span>
    <span class="day-label">🏛 Day 5 — Florence</span>
    <span class="day-detail">Bargello Museum<br>Santa Croce<br>Local neighborhoods</span>
  </td>
  <td class="travel">
    <span class="day-num">10</span>
    <span class="day-label">🚄 Day 6 — Train South</span>
    <span class="day-detail">Italo #8902 (PIDCMA)<br>Departs FLR 12:28pm<br>Arrives Naples 3:28pm</span>
  </td>
  <td class="naples">
    <span class="day-num">11</span>
    <span class="day-label">🏺 Day 7 — Naples</span>
    <span class="day-detail">Herculaneum ruins<br>Ancient Roman city<br>MANN Museum option</span>
  </td>
  <td class="naples">
    <span class="day-num">12</span>
    <span class="day-label">🏺 Day 8 — Naples</span>
    <span class="day-detail">MANN Museum<br>Cappella Sansevero<br>Spaccanapoli</span>
  </td>
  <td class="naples-depart">
    <span class="day-num">13</span>
    <span class="day-label">✈️ Day 9 — Fly to Puglia</span>
    <span class="day-detail">AZ 1270: NAP→FCO 3:05pm<br>AZ 1623: FCO→BDS 5:15pm<br>Arrive Brindisi 6:25pm</span>
  </td>
</tr>

<!-- Week 3: Jun 14–20 -->
<tr>
  <td class="puglia">
    <span class="day-num">14</span>
    <span class="day-label">🫒 Day 10 — Brindisi</span>
    <span class="day-detail">First full Puglia day<br>Harbor walk<br>Colonne Romane</span>
  </td>
  <td class="puglia">
    <span class="day-num">15</span>
    <span class="day-label">🫒 Day 11 — Puglia</span>
    <span class="day-detail">Tour Day 1<br>(details TBD)</span>
  </td>
  <td class="puglia">
    <span class="day-num">16</span>
    <span class="day-label">🫒 Day 12 — Puglia</span>
    <span class="day-detail">Tour Day 2<br>(details TBD)</span>
  </td>
  <td class="puglia">
    <span class="day-num">17</span>
    <span class="day-label">🫒 Day 13 — Puglia</span>
    <span class="day-detail">Tour Day 3<br>(details TBD)</span>
  </td>
  <td class="puglia">
    <span class="day-num">18</span>
    <span class="day-label">🫒 Day 14 — Puglia</span>
    <span class="day-detail">Tour Day 4<br>(details TBD)</span>
  </td>
  <td class="puglia">
    <span class="day-num">19</span>
    <span class="day-label">🫒 Day 15 — Puglia</span>
    <span class="day-detail">Tour Day 5<br>Pack for departure</span>
  </td>
  <td class="travel">
    <span class="day-num">20</span>
    <span class="day-label">✈️ Day 16 — Fly Home</span>
    <span class="day-detail">BDS→MUC 10:55am<br>MUC→ORD 3:40pm<br>ORD→MSN 9:15pm</span>
  </td>
</tr>

<!-- Week 4: Jun 21–27 -->
<tr>
  <td class="home-return">
    <span class="day-num">21</span>
    <span class="day-label">🏠 Home</span>
    <span class="day-detail">Arrived ~10:30pm last night</span>
  </td>
  <td class="home"><span class="day-num">22</span></td>
  <td class="home"><span class="day-num">23</span></td>
  <td class="home"><span class="day-num">24</span></td>
  <td class="home"><span class="day-num">25</span></td>
  <td class="home"><span class="day-num">26</span></td>
  <td class="home"><span class="day-num">27</span></td>
</tr>

<!-- Week 5: Jun 28–30 -->
<tr>
  <td class="home"><span class="day-num">28</span></td>
  <td class="home"><span class="day-num">29</span></td>
  <td class="home"><span class="day-num">30</span></td>
  <td class="empty"></td>
  <td class="empty"></td>
  <td class="empty"></td>
  <td class="empty"></td>
</tr>

</tbody>
</table>
</div>

<div class="legend-wrap" style="display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:0.6rem; margin-top:1rem; font-size:0.8rem; align-items:center;">
  <strong>Legend:</strong>
  <span style="background:#dbeafe;border:2px solid #2563eb;padding:2px 8px;border-radius:4px;">✈️ Flight Day</span>
  <span style="background:#bfdbfe;border:2px solid #1d4ed8;padding:2px 8px;border-radius:4px;">🚄 Train Day</span>
  <span style="background:#dcfce7;border:1px solid #16a34a;padding:2px 8px;border-radius:4px;">🏛 Florence</span>
  <span style="background:#ffedd5;border:1px solid #ea580c;padding:2px 8px;border-radius:4px;">🏺 Naples</span>
  <span style="background:#fef9c3;border:1px solid #ca8a04;padding:2px 8px;border-radius:4px;">🫒 Puglia</span>
  <span style="background:#f5f5f5;border:1px solid #ccc;padding:2px 8px;border-radius:4px;">Home</span>
</div>
```

::: {.callout-tip}
## Printing This Calendar

Use **File → Print** (Ctrl+P / Cmd+P). The navigation and sidebar hide automatically. For best results, select **Landscape** orientation.
:::

## Reservations in Hand

| What | Code | Date |
|------|------|------|
| Outbound flights (Lufthansa) | FMWYOJ | Jun 5–6 |
| Return flights (Lufthansa/United) | FMWYOJ | Jun 20 |
| Italo train Florence → Naples | PIDCMA | Jun 10 |
| ITA flights Naples → Brindisi via Rome | IXYZMT | Jun 13 |
